title: Player Legacy Football Supporter Poster AI
sourceTitle: Player Legacy Football Supporter Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a reusable sports supporter vlogger with sports supporter content frame with fan energy, team-color atmosphere, social creator styling, and event-ready composition. A giant realistic side-profile portrait dominates the upper half of the artwork, while multiple scenes from the player's journey are blended inside a. Epic medieval castles, floating kingdoms, dramatic mountains, sacred temples, ruined arenas, waterfalls, dragons, mist, glowing particles, and fantas. Supporter. Subject: ultra-realistic adult female football travel vlogger with cheerful energetic personality. Identity Lock: same face, age, hairstyle, body proportions, skin tone, and facial features across every scene. Outfit Rotation: Argentina, Brazil, Mexico, USA, and neutral supporter-inspired streetwear looks. Fan Actions: cheering, dancing, singing, peace signs, finger hearts, laughing with supporters, walking to stadiums. Location Sequence: airport arrival, street food area, fan zone, stadium exterior, seat view, and celebration street. Supporter Graphics: scarves, wristbands, credentials, flags, stickers, and readable team/country labels without official logos. Subject: Make ultra-realistic adult female football travel vlogger with cheerful energetic personality the clear hero subject. Preserve the source prompt's subject hierarchy and avoid adding unrelated people or props. Scene and Context: Place the subject in airport arrival, street food area, fan zone, stadium exterior, seat view, and celebration street. Keep the background details useful to the concept rather than decorative filler. Composition and Layout: Use travel-vlogger sequence logic with consistent identity, changing supporter outfits, and stadium/fan-zone scene variety. Keep the layout faithful to this template's own visual mechanic and do not introduce unrelated layout systems. Style and Rendering: Render in ultra-realistic social travel photography with joyful movement, crowd-safe energy, and football supporter styling. Keep this template's fixed material, texture, camera, illustration, or UI finish consistent across variants. Color and Lighting: Use country or team-inspired color blocks without official federation marks. Lighting should match the template mood, separate the hero subject from the background, and stay readable at thumbnail size. Visible Typography: English-only, Latin alphabet only. Use one concise English headline or short English labels only when the template needs visible writing; otherwise keep visible writing minimal, intentional, and clean. Quality Restrictions: Avoid random letters, watermarks, malformed hands or faces, broken anatomy, duplicate logos, noisy background clutter, unreadable microcopy, and off-style artifacts.

使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.title: Player Legacy Football Supporter Poster Variant 01

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a reusable sports supporter vlogger with sports supporter content frame with fan energy, team-color atmosphere, social creator styling, and event-ready composition. A giant realistic side-profile portrait dominates the upper half of the artwork, while multiple scenes from the player's journey are blended inside a. Epic medieval castles, floating kingdoms, dramatic mountains, sacred temples, ruined arenas, waterfalls, dragons, mist, glowing particles, and fantas. Supporter. Subject: adult football supporter group leader wearing a fictional national jersey. Identity Lock: consistent face, hair, jersey palette, and supporter accessories throughout the poster set. Outfit Rotation: home jersey, away scarf look, varsity jacket, fan hoodie, and match-day streetwear. Fan Actions: chanting, holding scarf overhead, taking selfies, reacting to a goal, and waving to the crowd. Location Sequence: metro station, city square, fan march, stadium gate, and floodlit stands. Supporter Graphics: fictional crest shapes, country color blocks, large headline, fixture badge, and no real federation marks.
